member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:Genetic.DatabaseDataSetTableAdapters.wordsTableAdapter
member.summary: Represents the connection and commands used to retrieve and save data.

member.summary: Represents the connection and commands used to retrieve and save data.

member.name: T:Genetic.DatabaseDataSetTableAdapters.personTableAdapter
member.summary: Represents the connection and commands used to retrieve and save data.

member.name: T:Genetic.DatabaseDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager
member.summary: TableAdapterManager is used to coordinate TableAdapters in the dataset to enable Hierarchical Update scenarios

member.name: M:Genetic.DatabaseDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateUpdatedRows(Genetic.DatabaseDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Update rows in top-down order.

member.name: M:Genetic.DatabaseDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateInsertedRows(Genetic.DatabaseDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Insert rows in top-down order.

member.name: M:Genetic.DatabaseDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateDeletedRows(Genetic.DatabaseDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Delete rows in bottom-up order.

member.name: M:Genetic.DatabaseDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.GetRealUpdatedRows(System.Data.DataRow[],System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Remove inserted rows that become updated rows after calling TableAdapter.Update(inserted rows) first

member.name: M:Genetic.DatabaseDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateAll(Genetic.DatabaseDataSet)
member.summary: Update all changes to the dataset.

member.name: T:Genetic.DatabaseDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateOrderOption
member.summary: Update Order Option

member.name: T:Genetic.DatabaseDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.SelfReferenceComparer
member.summary: Used to sort self-referenced table's rows

member.name: T:Genetic.Form1
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Genetic.Form1.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Genetic.Form1.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.
